title: Tesla is not alone: 18 (and a half) other big stocks are headed for their worst year on record
text: In the worst year for stocks since the Great Recession, several big names are headed for their worst year on record with just one trading day left in 2022.

title: Charter's (CHTR) Slow Internet Customer Growth Impacts Prospects
text: Charter Communications (CHTR) is expanding operations in the rural area to boost prospects and fend off competition.

title: Charter Communications Is Investing for Growth
text: The cable television industry is one of reinvention and change. What started out as community-based antenna television morphed into satellite-driven multichannel systems and then eventually into the fastest internet pipe with its hybrid fiber-coax infrastructure.

title: Why Is Charter Communications (CHTR) Stock Trending Today?
text: Amid a terrible outing for Wall Street, Charter Communications (NASDAQ: CHTR ) added to the pain, with CHTR stock dipping more than 2.5% on Thursday afternoon. In the prior session, CHTR stock plunged 16.4% in what Bloomberg described as the worst trading performance in its history.

title: Charter Communications: Investor Day Capex Angst Might Present Buying Opportunity
text: Charter Communications fell by 16.38% yesterday following an investor day which set out a $10.65 billion capex plan. This aggregated with their buyback policy looks set to boost a net debt burden that stood at $96.8 billion in the last reported fiscal 2022 third quarter.

title: Charter: Market Is Wrong To Panic After Investor Day
text: The main Charter Communications, Inc. news was a one-off increase in capital expenditures during 2023-25; we believe investors are wrong to panic on this. One part of the increase is the Rural Constructive Initiative, much of which was known previously and generates a teens IRR.

title: Charter stock heads for worst day on record as spending plans spook Wall Street
text: Charter Communications Inc. has big spending plans, and that has some investors heading for the hills.

title: Why Charter Communications Is Plummeting 14% Today
text: Steady telecom stocks don't often make moves as big as these, but Charter's investor day presentation left investors worried about its high spending.

title: Why Harmonic Stock Is Skyrocketing Today
text: News from a key customer has Harmonic shares soaring, and the stock is now up roughly 24% year to date.

title: Charter Stock Dives On Higher Capital Spending While Supplier Harmonic Gains
text: Shares in Charter Communications tumbled on its plans to hike capital spending while network equipment supplier Harmonic jumped on the news. The post Charter Stock Dives On Higher Capital Spending While Supplier Harmonic Gains appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Charter stock falls after 2023 capex forecast comes in above Wall Street expectations
text: Shares of Charter Communications Inc. CHTR, +2.15% were off more than 5% in after-hours trading Tuesday after the company held an investor day, which contained expectations for next year's capital expenditures. Charter expects $6.5 billion to $6.8 billion in full-year capital expenditures, excluding those from line extensions, according to the presentation.

title: WorkLLama Congratulates Winner Spectrum on Esteemed TIARA Talent Acquisition Awards for Candidate Experience
text: Digital Survey Matches Applicants to Jobs that Fit Their Skills, Interests, and Career Goals ALPHARETTA, Ga. , Dec. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- WorkLLama, technology provider of a single, modern, AI-driven talent marketing, relationship management, engagement, and direct sourcing suite, is thrilled to announce Spectrum's Fit Finder Technology as the winner of the 2022 WorkLLama Candidate Experience Award.
